name: codex-statusline
description: Status companion for OpenAI Codex CLI using hooks, config inspection, and terminal-friendly rendering.

interface.shortDescription: Render useful Codex session state in hooks, shell prompts, or tmux.
interface.longDescription: A Codex CLI status companion that installs through npx, merges Codex hooks safely, records lightweight session state, and renders model, reasoning effort, cwd, git, sandbox, approval, and approximate context information.
